info.title: EHPS API
info.description: Equipment Health & Performance System — semiconductor fab equipment maintenance. Covers fab-coordinator machine/technician management, routine checkups, alert escalation and approval, repair assignment/completion, and the equipment health dashboard. All endpoints (except /api/auth/**) require a bearer JWT obtained from POST /api/auth/login, and are scoped by role: FAB_COORDINATOR, MANAGER, or TECHNICIAN. See docs/API-CONTRACT.md for the full endpoint contract.

tags.name: Dashboard
tags.description: Equipment health/performance history for reporting. Requires role MANAGER or FAB_COORDINATOR.

tags.name: Fab — Machines
tags.description: Fab-coordinator management of their own registered machines. Requires role FAB_COORDINATOR.

tags.name: Technician — Checkups
tags.description: Technician-facing checkup work: view assigned checkups and submit results. Requires role TECHNICIAN.

tags.name: Technician — Repairs
tags.description: Technician-facing repair work: view assigned repair alerts and mark repairs complete. Requires role TECHNICIAN.

tags.name: Manager — Machines & Technicians
tags.description: Manager read access to all machines and technicians across the fab (not scoped to a single owner). Requires role MANAGER.

tags.name: Fab — Checkup Assignments
tags.description: Fab-coordinator assignment of technicians to routine machine checkups. Requires role FAB_COORDINATOR.

tags.name: Authentication
tags.description: Public registration and login endpoints (no bearer token required).

tags.name: Machine Types
tags.description: Shared machine-type reference data, available to any authenticated role. Some sub-lists are further scoped by role.

tags.name: Manager — Alerts
tags.description: Manager alert lifecycle: review escalated alerts and approve or reject them. Requires role MANAGER.

tags.name: Fab — Technicians
tags.description: Fab-coordinator management of technicians. Requires role FAB_COORDINATOR.

tags.name: Fab — Alerts
tags.description: Fab-coordinator alert lifecycle: review pending/approved alerts, escalate to manager, and assign repair technicians. Requires role FAB_COORDINATOR.

get.description: Returns a single technician managed by the calling fab coordinator. Requires role FAB_COORDINATOR.

put.description: Updates an existing technician managed by the calling fab coordinator. Requires role FAB_COORDINATOR.

get.description: Returns a single machine owned by the calling fab coordinator. Requires role FAB_COORDINATOR.

put.description: Updates an existing machine owned by the calling fab coordinator. Requires role FAB_COORDINATOR.

post.description: Marks the repair for the given alert as complete, recording the repair outcome. Requires role TECHNICIAN.
Records the results of a performed checkup on the given machine, raising alerts if parameters are out of range. Requires role TECHNICIAN.
Rejects an escalated alert. Requires role MANAGER.
Approves an escalated alert, allowing it to proceed to repair assignment. Requires role MANAGER.

get.description: Returns all technicians managed by the calling fab coordinator. Requires role FAB_COORDINATOR.

post.description: Creates a new technician account managed by the calling fab coordinator. Requires role FAB_COORDINATOR.

get.description: Returns all machines owned by the calling fab coordinator. Requires role FAB_COORDINATOR.

post.description: Adds a new machine owned by the calling fab coordinator. Requires role FAB_COORDINATOR.

post.summary: Assign a technician to a checkup
post.description: Assigns a technician to perform a routine checkup on a machine. Requires role FAB_COORDINATOR.

post.summary: Assign a repair technician to an alert
post.description: Assigns a technician to repair the machine associated with an approved alert. Requires role FAB_COORDINATOR.
Sends a pending alert to the manager for approval. Requires role FAB_COORDINATOR.
Creates a new user account with a role (technician, manager, or fab_coordinator). Public endpoint, no authentication required. Returns the created user without a token.

post.summary: Log in and obtain a JWT
post.description: Authenticates a user by email/password and returns a bearer JWT plus the user profile. Public endpoint, no authentication required.

get.summary: Get machine details for a repair
get.description: Returns machine details for a machine assigned to the calling technician for repair. Requires role TECHNICIAN.
Returns approved alerts assigned to the calling technician for repair. Requires role TECHNICIAN.

get.summary: Get a single approved repair alert
get.description: Returns a single approved repair alert assigned to the calling technician. Requires role TECHNICIAN.

get.summary: Get machine details for a checkup
get.description: Returns machine details for a machine assigned to the calling technician for checkup. Requires role TECHNICIAN.
Returns checkups currently assigned to the calling technician. Requires role TECHNICIAN.
Returns every technician across the fab. Requires role MANAGER.
Returns every machine across all fab coordinators. Requires role MANAGER.
Returns every alert visible to managers. Requires role MANAGER.
Returns alerts escalated by a fab coordinator that are awaiting manager approval. Requires role MANAGER.
Returns all machine types. Available to any authenticated role.

get.summary: List technicians qualified for a machine type
get.description: Returns technicians qualified to service the given machine type. Requires role FAB_COORDINATOR.

get.summary: Get parameter rules for a machine type
get.description: Returns the checkup parameter rules configured for the given machine type. Available to any authenticated role.

get.summary: List machines of a given type
get.description: Returns machines of the given type. Requires role FAB_COORDINATOR or MANAGER.

get.summary: List candidate technicians for an alert
get.description: Returns technicians qualified to repair the machine associated with the given alert. Requires role FAB_COORDINATOR.
Returns alerts awaiting fab-coordinator triage. Requires role FAB_COORDINATOR.
Returns manager-approved alerts that do not yet have a repair technician assigned. Requires role FAB_COORDINATOR.
Returns equipment checkup/repair history within an optional date range and machine type filter. Requires role MANAGER or FAB_COORDINATOR.

parameters.name: typeId
parameters.description: Machine type ID filter; 0 means all types
